overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a sunlit vineyard and village in the Toussaint region. The character travels along dirt paths lined with grapevines, passes an armored horse, observes a woman stomping grapes in a barrel, and walks through a village square where villagers dine outdoors at a large table.

rows of grapevines on terraced hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path through a vineyard, with rows of grapevines on both sides and distant mountains visible. A villager works in the fields to the right while stone village buildings sit atop the hill in the distance.

events.description: armored horse appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing an armored horse standing by the roadside

entered.detail: horse wearing decorative armor and blue cloth covering
stacked wooden barrels near the vineyard edge

segments.scene_description: The path continues through the vineyard where an armored horse stands on the right. Village buildings with orange roofs become more prominent on the left as the camera approaches the settlement outskirts.

segments.scene_description: Entering the village proper, the path becomes cobblestone. A woman stomps grapes in a large wooden barrel on the right. Stone buildings with orange roofs line the path, and the vineyard rows give way to village structures.

events.description: entering village square with outdoor dining area and seated villagers

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square past villagers dining at an outdoor table

notable_agents.action: group of three villagers sitting at round table eating and drinking

entered.detail: round wooden table with chairs and food spread
decorative stone balustrade along the path edge
covered well structure in the square center

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a village square with cobblestone paving. Villagers sit at a round outdoor dining table in the center. A stone balustrade lines the left side, and a covered well structure stands in the distance. The atmosphere is peaceful and social.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path continuing past residential area

events.description: child runs past on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the village path as a child runs ahead

notable_agents.action: child running along the path ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wooden canopy structure with hanging items

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village square behind, the path continues past a wooden market structure on the right. A child runs ahead on the path, and the scene returns to a quieter village lane with distant mountains visible again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched rows of a vineyard into the heart of a bustling village and back out toward the countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by grapevines and distant mountains, passing a field worker as stone buildings appear on a far hill. As the camera advances, the path leads past an armored horse and brings the orange-roofed village outskirts into closer view before the terrain shifts from dirt to cobblestone. The scene then opens into a lively village square where a woman stomps grapes in a wooden barrel and locals dine at a large outdoor table beside a stone balustrade and a covered well. Finally, the camera moves past a wooden market structure and a running child, leaving the social hub behind to return to a quiet village lane with the mountains visible once more.
